# Adediran Adeyemi — Freelance Data Scientist & AI/ML Engineer

## Who I Am
Adediran Adeyemi is a freelance data scientist and AI/ML engineer specializing in e-commerce and retail analytics. Based remotely and available worldwide, he helps e-commerce founders, retail operators, and SaaS teams turn raw data into revenue-generating decisions.

He has 4+ years of experience building machine learning systems that ship in weeks, not months, and pay for themselves by uncovering revenue left on the table.

## What I Do
- Churn prediction: predict which customers will leave 30–90 days before they do
- Cart abandonment analytics: identify why shoppers abandon and when to intervene
- Customer lifetime value (CLV) modeling: identify your $10K customers vs your $100 ones
- Inventory forecasting & demand prediction: prevent stockouts and overstock situations
- Customer segmentation: RFM analysis, behavioral segmentation, cohort analysis
- Attribution modeling: understand which marketing channels drive real revenue
- NLP & review classification: process thousands of customer reviews automatically
- Lead scoring: predict purchase likelihood with ML (95%+ accuracy demonstrated)
- Power BI dashboard development: interactive dashboards your team actually uses
- RAG systems: retrieval-augmented generation for document-heavy research tasks

## Who I Help
- E-commerce store owners and founders (Shopify, WooCommerce, custom platforms)
- Retail businesses with sales pattern and inventory challenges
- SaaS companies dealing with subscription churn
- Real estate investors and agents needing valuation models
- Any business with data they're not fully using

## Key Results Delivered
- Diagnosed a 90% revenue drop for a retail business; identified 85% customer retention failure as root cause
- Identified $500K+ annual cart abandonment losses for e-commerce clients
- Built inventory demand forecasting with 80% accuracy
- Processed 29,000 customer reviews automatically with NLP classification
- Built lead scoring model with 95%+ purchase prediction accuracy
- Built RAG system across 50M+ tokens from 402 S&P MidCap company filings
- Built NYC property price predictor with 80% accuracy
- Created bidirectional Yoruba-English translation model for low-resource NLP

## Technologies & Tools
Python, Scikit-learn, LightGBM, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, RAG, FastAPI, Flask, Docker, Streamlit, Power BI, DAX, Power Query, SQL, Pandas, Google Analytics, Zilliz, OpenAI API, Web Scraping (Beautiful Soup), REST APIs
